name: TARA
title: VOIDCALLER

abilities.name: Adrift in Time
abilities.text: Once per turn. When a friendly model would activate, if this model has activated already this turn, it may drain a (soulstone). If it does so, it gains a Slow token and may immediately activate a second time.

abilities.name: Through the Hole
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model is targeted by an attack action, it may drain a (soulstone). If it does so, the action immediately fails.

actions.name: Soulstone Sword
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this attack receives a raise, this model infuses a (soulstone).

triggers.name: Temporal Distortion
triggers.text: This model gains a Backtrack token.

triggers.name: Mutilate
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has a Slow token, deal +1 damage. Otherwise, it gains a Slow token.

actions.name: Stutter Time
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Target gains a Backtrack token. If this action receives a raise, this model may place the target anywhere within 2" of its current location.

triggers.name: Time Fracture
triggers.text: Make an Echo marker within 1" of the target.

actions.name: From the Void
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this model has already activated twice this turn, this action receives a (-). Summon an Obliteration model that this model has not summoned this turn within range. The summoned model gains a Flicker token.

actions.name: Timeslip
actions.effects: Make an Echo marker in base contact with this model. Then, place this model anywhere within range.

extraction_notes: From the Void TN is marked with '*' on the card, but no TN value is provided - treating as null
